deprecated_yaml_import_issue.description:
Configuring NX584 using YAML is deprecated.

While importing your configuration, an error occurred when trying to connect to the NX584 panel. Please restart Home Assistant to try again, or remove the existing YAML configuration and set the integration up via the UI.
deprecated_yaml_import_issue.title: NX584 YAML configuration deprecated
